name: Streamarr
description: Stream Usenet content on demand through the Streamarr Core Server. Thin adapter — no download-to-disk.
overview: Surfaces the Streamarr Core Server's Usenet search results inside Jellyfin and makes them playable through Jellyfin's transcoding pipeline.
changelog: Reuse a retained capability on pause/resume and Jellyfin source reopens instead of repeating NZB, health, materialization, and ffprobe work, and deduplicate concurrent resolves of the same release; add an admin-only manual purge for idle ephemeral files that refuses to interrupt active streams; raise per-stream pacing to keep high-bitrate remuxes ahead of realtime; and key retained sessions to the authenticated console user.
